# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Unreleased work in progress**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 (next) includes a native resource leak fix in SKImage. This unreleased branch corrects a native handle leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) and adds a cross-platform performance tracker.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was leaking the native handle when the subset was applied. The handle is now correctly disposed in all code paths. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
